mnemonics: Bitcoin's Whitepaper Was Released In 2008, Creating Genesis Block. (B-W-R-I-2008-C-G-B)
keyPoints: The concept was introduced by Satoshi Nakamoto in the 2008 Bitcoin whitepaper.
The first blockchain was implemented as the public ledger for Bitcoin transactions in 2009.
Blockchain technology is built upon decades of prior research in cryptography and distributed systems.
commonMistakes: Believing blockchain and Bitcoin are the same thing (Blockchain is the technology; Bitcoin is its first application).
Thinking blockchain was invented from scratch in 2008 (it combines pre-existing concepts like cryptographic hashing and Merkle trees).
